items.title: Alice Springs gripped by violence after arrest of Kumanjayi Little Baby's alleged killer

children.content: Wild scenes erupt on the streets of Alice Springs after the arrest of Jefferson Lewis over the alleged murder of five-year-old Kumanjayi Little Baby.

articles.title: Jefferson Lewis arrested over alleged murder of Kumanjayi Little Baby

children.content: Jefferson Lewis has been the subject of a police manhunt, and is accused of murdering the young girl in Alice Springs.

image.altText: Young girl in pink dress does peace sign with fingers

articles.title: Community in mourning after 5yo girl's body found

children.content: Tributes are flowing in Alice Springs for a five-year-old Aboriginal girl whose body was found earlier today, as the community mourns her death.

items.title: Australia in talks over latest US proposal to open Strait of Hormuz

children.content: Australia has begun discussions with the United States about joining the latest US proposal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, as the Trump administration tries to build an international coalition to restore freedom of navigation in the critical waterway.

items.title: Crucial interest rate has broken from the global benchmark, costing us billions

items.title: Police told 'not to stay the entire duration' of Hannukah event before terror attack

children.content: NSW Police officers assigned to patrol the Hanukkah celebration targeted in the Bondi Beach terrorist attack were told they did not need to "stay the entire duration" of the event, despite members of the Jewish community fearing it was at risk.

articles.title: Counterterrorism intelligence's share of funding in 'significant' decline
